---
title: "2026 NWSL Full Schedule"
---

*Kickoff times are approximate based on historical trends.

```{=html}
<div class="mb-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
  <span class="text-muted small fw-semibold me-1">Time zone:</span>
  <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary tz-btn" onclick="setTZ('America/New_York', 'ET', this)">ET</button>
  <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary tz-btn" onclick="setTZ('America/Chicago', 'CT', this)">CT</button>
  <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary tz-btn" onclick="setTZ('America/Denver', 'MT', this)">MT</button>
  <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary tz-btn" onclick="setTZ('America/Los_Angeles', 'PT', this)">PT</button>
</div>
<div class="mb-4 d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
  <label for="team-select" class="fw-semibold text-nowrap mb-0">Filter by team:</label>
  <select id="team-select" class="form-select" style="max-width: 220px;" onchange="filterTeam(this.value)">
    <option value="all">All Teams</option>
    <option value="Angel City">Angel City</option>
    <option value="Bay">Bay</option>
    <option value="Boston">Boston</option>
    <option value="Chicago">Chicago</option>
    <option value="Denver">Denver</option>
    <option value="Houston">Houston</option>
    <option value="Kansas City">Kansas City</option>
    <option value="Louisville">Louisville</option>
    <option value="NJ/NY">NJ/NY</option>
    <option value="North Carolina">North Carolina</option>
    <option value="Orlando">Orlando</option>
    <option value="Portland">Portland</option>
    <option value="San Diego">San Diego</option>
    <option value="Seattle">Seattle</option>
    <option value="Utah Royals">Utah Royals</option>
    <option value="Washington">Washington</option>
  </select>
</div>
<p id="no-results" style="display:none" class="text-muted">No games found for this team.</p>
```

```{=html}
<div class="day-section"><h3>Friday, March 13</h3>
<table class="table table-sm table-hover">
<thead><tr><th>Home</th><th>Away</th><th>Announced/Approx. Kickoff Time</th><th>Stream</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="Washington" data-away="Portland">

</tr>
</tbody></table>
</div>
```

```{=html}
  <td>Seattle</td><td>Utah Royals</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-04-27T00:00:00Z" data-approx="2026-04-27T00:08:00Z">8:00/<strong>8:08 PM ET</strong></td><td><a href="https://victoryplus.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Victory+</a></td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
</div>
<div class="day-section"><h3>Wednesday, April 29</h3>
<table class="table table-sm table-hover">
<thead><tr><th>Home</th><th>Away</th><th>Announced/Approx. Kickoff Time</th><th>Stream</th></tr></thead>

  <td>Portland</td><td>San Diego</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-04-30T02:00:00Z"><strong>10:00 PM ET</strong></td><td><a href="https://www.paramountplus.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">CBS Sports Network</a></td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
</div>
```

```{=html}
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="NJ/NY" data-away="Houston">
  <td>NJ/NY</td><td>Houston</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-05-31T19:00:00Z"><strong>3:00 PM ET</strong></td><td><a href="https://plus.espn.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">ESPN+</a>, <a href="https://www.nwslsoccer.com/plus" target="_blank" rel="noopener">NWSL+</a></td>
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="Angel City" data-away="North Carolina">
  <td>Angel City</td><td>North Carolina</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-05-31T23:00:00Z" data-approx="2026-05-31T23:08:00Z">7:00/<strong>7:08 PM ET</strong></td><td><a href="https://victoryplus.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Victory+</a></td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
</div>
```

```{=html}
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="Bay" data-away="San Diego">
  <td>Bay</td><td>San Diego</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-11-01T22:00:00Z"><strong>5:00 PM ET</strong></td><td>TBD</td>
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="NJ/NY" data-away="Utah Royals">
  <td>NJ/NY</td><td>Utah Royals</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-11-01T22:00:00Z"><strong>5:00 PM ET</strong></td><td>TBD</td>
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="Houston" data-away="Portland">
  <td>Houston</td><td>Portland</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-11-01T22:00:00Z"><strong>5:00 PM ET</strong></td><td>TBD</td>
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="North Carolina" data-away="Denver">
  <td>North Carolina</td><td>Denver</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-11-01T22:00:00Z"><strong>5:00 PM ET</strong></td><td>TBD</td>
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="Louisville" data-away="Kansas City">
  <td>Louisville</td><td>Kansas City</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-11-01T22:00:00Z"><strong>5:00 PM ET</strong></td><td>TBD</td>
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="Seattle" data-away="Orlando">
  <td>Seattle</td><td>Orlando</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-11-01T22:00:00Z"><strong>5:00 PM ET</strong></td><td>TBD</td>
</tr>
<tr class="game-row" data-home="Washington" data-away="Chicago">
  <td>Washington</td><td>Chicago</td><td class="time-cell" data-announced="2026-11-01T22:00:00Z"><strong>5:00 PM ET</strong></td><td>TBD</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>
function filterTeam(team) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.game-row').forEach(row => {
    row.style.display =
      (team === 'all' || row.dataset.home === team || row.dataset.away === team)
      ? '' : 'none';
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.day-section').forEach(section => {
    const visible = [...section.querySelectorAll('.game-row')].some(r => r.style.display !== 'none');
    section.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
  });

  // Quarto wraps markdown ## headings in <section class="level2">
  document.querySelectorAll('section.level2').forEach(section => {
    const visible = [...section.querySelectorAll('.day-section')].some(d => d.style.display !== 'none');
    section.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
  });

  const anyVisible = [...document.querySelectorAll('.game-row')].some(r => r.style.display !== 'none');
  document.getElementById('no-results').style.display = anyVisible ? 'none' : 'block';
}
</script>
```
